function.name: mouse_click
function.description: Single left-click on a UI element by its ID from the perception context.

element_id.description: Element ID as shown in the annotated screenshot.

function.name: mouse_double_click
function.description: Double-click on a UI element by its ID.

element_id.description: Element ID as shown in the annotated screenshot.

function.name: mouse_right_click
function.description: Right-click on a UI element to open context menu.

element_id.description: Element ID as shown in the annotated screenshot.

function.name: scroll
function.description: Scroll the viewport. Use 'short' for one step (3 lines), 'long' for one page.

direction.description: Scroll direction. up/down for vertical scroll, left/right for horizontal scroll.

distance.description: Scroll distance. short = about 3 lines, long = about one page.

element_id.description: Optional: scroll within a specific element instead of the whole viewport.

function.name: type_text
function.description: Type text into the currently focused input field. Supports both Chinese and English.

text.description: Plain text to type into the focused input.

clear_first.description: If true, select-all and delete before typing.

function.name: hotkey
function.description: Press a keyboard shortcut combination. Examples: ctrl+c, ctrl+v, alt+f4, ctrl+shift+t, win+d.

keys.description: Key combo as plus-separated string, e.g. 'ctrl+shift+esc'.

function.name: key_press
function.description: Press a single key. Use for navigation keys: Enter, Escape, Tab, ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Delete, Backspace, etc.

key.description: Single key name, e.g. Enter, Escape, Tab, ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Delete, Backspace.

function.name: execute_terminal
function.description: Execute a PowerShell command. REQUIRES human approval before execution. Use only when GUI interaction is insufficient.

reason.description: Explain why terminal execution is necessary.

function.name: mcp_call
function.description: Call a tool provided by a connected MCP server. List available MCP tools with get_viewport first.

server_name.description: MCP server name as defined in config.toml.

function.name: invoke_skill
function.description: Execute a pre-defined user skill (e.g. create-excel-pivot, fill-word-template). Skills are composite actions that automate complex repetitive tasks.

skill_name.description: Skill name as registered in the skills/ directory.

inputs.description: Named input variables the skill requires.

function.name: wait
function.description: Wait for a specified duration before the next action. Use after triggering an operation that needs time to complete (e.g. file save, app launch).

milliseconds.description: Delay duration in milliseconds. Prefer shorter waits and re-checking state instead of long sleeps.

function.name: finish_task
function.description: Signal that the assigned task has been completed successfully.

summary.description: Brief summary of what was accomplished.

function.name: report_failure
function.description: Signal that the task cannot be completed and explain why.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation why the task cannot be completed.

last_attempted_action.description: Optional: brief description of the last action that failed before giving up.

function.name: plan_task
function.description: MUST be called first. Produce a high-level plan with sub-goals. Each step describes WHAT to achieve with a recommended execution mode. 'combo' runs a pre-defined skill (fastest, zero LLM). 'chat' for terminal/keyboard/file ops without vision. 'vlm' for visual tasks. ALWAYS prefer combo when a matching skill exists.

final_goal.description: Restatement of the user's final goal in clear, specific terms.

plan_summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the overall approach.

description.description: High-level description of what this step should achieve.

recommended_mode.description: Recommended execution mode. combo=pre-defined skill (fastest). chat=terminal/keyboard/file ops. vlm=visual tasks.

required_skills.description: Skill names the executing agent should follow for this step.

guidance.description: Brief hints for the loop agent executing this step (e.g. 'use Win+S to search', 'look for Save button').

params.description: For recommended_mode=combo: named parameters the skill requires.

function.name: evaluate_completion
function.description: Call this after all steps are done to self-evaluate whether the goal was fully achieved.

completed.description: True if the goal was fully achieved.

summary.description: Brief summary of what was accomplished or why it failed.

function.name: finish_step
function.description: Signal that the current sub-goal/step has been completed successfully. Only call when the step's objective is fully achieved.

summary.description: Brief summary of what was accomplished in this step.

function.name: switch_to_vlm
function.description: Request switching to VLM (vision) mode. Use when you realize the current task requires visual interaction with the screen (e.g., clicking UI elements, reading screen content).

function.name: switch_to_chat
function.description: Request switching to chat (non-visual) mode. Use when you realize the current task can be done with terminal commands or keyboard shortcuts without needing to see the screen.

reason.description: Why chat mode is more appropriate.
